title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. gleitschense
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. gleitschense, also known as Lachenal's Hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is native to certain mountainous regions in Central and Eastern Europe and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as digestive problems and skin irritations. Hieracium lachenalii subsp. gleitschense can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for its potential health benefits.
